---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new provider, stage, config option, output format, or pipeline improvement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the gap you're hitting. E.g. "I can't generate data for domain X because...", "The judge always rejects samples when...", "There's no way to control Y from the config..."

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed? Be as specific as you can.

## Which part of the engine does this touch?

- [ ] Provider (new provider, credential handling)
- [ ] Config / schema (new field type, new config option)
- [ ] Stage 1 — axis discovery
- [ ] Stage 1.5 — logic filter
- [ ] Stage 2 — allocation plan
- [ ] Stage 3 — persona generation
- [ ] Stage 4 — generation
- [ ] Stage 5 — judge
- [ ] Stage 6 — dedup
- [ ] Quality report / output format
- [ ] CLI (new flag, new command)
- [ ] Other

## Example config (if applicable)

How would a user configure this feature? Show the YAML you'd want to write:

```yaml
# example of the new option / field
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.
